questions.question: India's Chandrayaan-3 mission achieved which milestone in August 2023?
questions.explanation: Chandrayaan-3's Vikram lander made a successful soft landing near the Moon's south pole on 23 August 2023, making India the 4th country to land on the Moon.

questions.question: The G20 Summit 2023 was hosted by India in which city?
questions.explanation: India hosted the G20 Summit in New Delhi on 9-10 September 2023 under the theme 'Vasudhaiva Kutumbakam' (One Earth, One Family, One Future).

questions.question: Which Indian cricketer retired from all forms of international cricket in January 2024?
questions.explanation: Wait — it was actually Rohit Sharma who retired from Test cricket in August 2024, and Virat Kohli from T20Is after the 2024 T20 World Cup.

questions.question: India's GDP growth rate for FY2023-24 was approximately:
questions.explanation: India's GDP growth rate for FY2023-24 was approximately 8.2%, making it one of the fastest growing major economies.

questions.question: Who won the Nobel Prize in Literature 2023?
questions.explanation: Norwegian author Jon Fosse won the Nobel Prize in Literature 2023 for his innovative plays and prose.

questions.question: The 'One Nation, One Election' concept proposes holding simultaneous elections for:
options: Lok Sabha and all State Assemblies
questions.explanation: One Nation, One Election proposes simultaneous elections for Lok Sabha and all State Legislative Assemblies.

questions.question: Project Tiger in India completes 50 years in 2023. The current number of tiger reserves in India is approximately:
questions.explanation: As of 2023, India has 53 tiger reserves. India's tiger population grew from ~1800 in 2010 to 3167 in 2022 census.

questions.question: UPI (Unified Payments Interface) crossed how many monthly transactions in 2023?
questions.explanation: UPI crossed 10 billion monthly transactions in 2023, making India's digital payments infrastructure world-leading.

questions.question: India's first domestic semiconductor chip production is being set up in which state?
questions.explanation: India's first semiconductor fab is being set up in Dholera, Gujarat, by Tata Electronics in partnership with Taiwan's PSMC.

questions.question: Which country won the ICC Cricket World Cup 2023?
questions.explanation: Australia won the ICC Cricket World Cup 2023 held in India, defeating India in the final at Ahmedabad.

questions.question: The Paris Olympics 2024 was held in which month?
questions.explanation: The Paris 2024 Summer Olympics was held from 26 July to 11 August 2024.

questions.question: India launched its first solar mission 'Aditya-L1' to study the Sun in:
questions.explanation: Aditya-L1, India's first solar observatory mission, was launched on 2 September 2023. It reached Lagrange Point 1 in January 2024.

questions.question: Which country became the newest member of BRICS in January 2024?
questions.explanation: Saudi Arabia, Ethiopia, UAE, Iran (and Egypt, Argentina — though Argentina declined) joined BRICS as new members from 1 January 2024.

questions.question: The Viksit Bharat@2047 initiative aims to make India a developed nation by:
questions.explanation: Viksit Bharat@2047 is India's vision to become a developed nation by 2047 — the centenary of independence.

questions.question: India's new Parliament building was inaugurated in:
questions.explanation: The new Parliament building was inaugurated by Prime Minister Narendra Modi on 28 May 2023.

questions.question: Which state in India became the first to implement the Uniform Civil Code (UCC)?
questions.explanation: Uttarakhand became the first Indian state to implement the Uniform Civil Code (UCC) in 2024.

questions.question: RBI's Digital Rupee (e₹) — Central Bank Digital Currency — was launched for retail use in:
questions.explanation: RBI launched the Digital Rupee (e₹) pilot for retail use on 1 December 2022.

questions.question: The Namo Bharat (RRTS) rapid rail corridor connects which two cities in its first phase?
questions.explanation: The Delhi-Meerut Regional Rapid Transit System (RRTS), India's first RRTS corridor, was inaugurated in October 2023.

questions.question: India's Defence expenditure as % of GDP is approximately:
questions.explanation: India spends approximately 2% of GDP on defence, making it one of the top 5 defence spenders globally.

questions.question: The 'Amrit Kaal' reference in Indian policy refers to the period:
questions.explanation: 'Amrit Kaal' refers to India's 25-year journey from 2022 to 2047 (India's 100th Independence Day) to become a developed nation.

questions.question: PM SVANIDHI scheme is designed to provide loans to:
questions.explanation: PM SVANidhi (PM Street Vendor's AtmaNirbhar Nidhi) provides working capital loans to street vendors affected by COVID-19.
